Literal.Value:
'# Den følgende kode til at oprette en dataframe og fjerne dublerede rækker udføres altid og fungerer som en indledning til dit script: 

# dataset <- data.frame(N DAYS X SITE (A), N DAYS X SITE (B), N (A), N (B), 
#                       TS (A), TS (B), TS MEAN (A), TS MEAN (B), TS SD (A), TS SD (B),
#                       AGA Mean (A), AGA Mean (B), AGA SD (A), AGA SD (B),
#                       SM (A), SM (B), SM MEAN (A), SM MEAN (B),SM SD (A), SM SD (B),
#                       NU Mean (A), NU Mean (B),NU SD (A), NU SD (B))
# dataset <- unique(dataset)

# Indsæt eller skriv din scriptkode her:

# ---- packages ----
suppressWarnings({ library(grid); library(gridExtra) })

# ---- helpers ----
getv <- function(nm) {
  if (nm %in% names(dataset)) as.numeric(dataset[[nm]][1]) else NA_real_
}
fmt_cur <- function(x) {if (is.na(x)) {""} else {paste0(format(round(x, 2), big.mark = ","), " kr.")}}
fmt_num <- function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), "", format(round(x, 2), big.mark = ","))
fmt_pct <- function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), "", paste0(round(x * 100, 1), "%"))
fmt_p   <- function(p) ifelse(is.na(p), "", ifelse(p < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p)))


# ---- Welch t-test function ----
welch_test <- function(meanA, sdA, nA, meanB, sdB, nB) {
  se    <- sqrt((sdA^2 / nA) + (sdB^2 / nB))
  tstat <- (meanB - meanA) / se
  df    <- ((sdA^2/nA + sdB^2/nB)^2) / (((sdA^2/nA)^2)/(nA-1) + ((sdB^2/nB)^2)/(nB-1))
  pval  <- 2 * pt(-abs(tstat), df)
  if (!is.finite(tstat)) tstat <- NA_real_
  if (!is.finite(df))    df    <- NA_real_
  if (!is.finite(pval))  pval  <- NA_real_
  list(t=tstat, df=df, p=pval)
}

# Generic row builder (Welch test + formatting)
welch_row <- function(metric,
                      meanA, sdA, nA,
                      meanB, sdB, nB,
                      totalA = NA_real_, totalB = NA_real_,
                      currency_means = TRUE) {

  # Welch from summary stats
  se    <- sqrt((sdA^2 / nA) + (sdB^2 / nB))
  tstat <- (meanB - meanA) / se
  df    <- ((sdA^2/nA + sdB^2/nB)^2) /
           (((sdA^2/nA)^2)/(nA-1) + ((sdB^2/nB)^2)/(nB-1))
  pval  <- 2 * pt(-abs(tstat), df)

  if (!is.finite(tstat)) tstat <- NA_real_
  if (!is.finite(df))    df    <- NA_real_
  if (!is.finite(pval))  pval  <- NA_real_

  # choose formatter for means/diff depending on metric
  f_mean <- if (currency_means) fmt_cur else fmt_num

  diff <- meanB - meanA
  pct  <- ifelse(is.na(meanA) || meanA == 0, NA_real_, diff/meanA)

  data.frame(
    Metric       = metric,
    `Total A`    = if (is.na(totalA)) "" else f_mean(totalA),
    `Total B`    = if (is.na(totalB)) "" else f_mean(totalB),
    `Mean A`     = f_mean(meanA),
    `Mean B`     = f_mean(meanB),
    `Diff (B–A)` = f_mean(diff),
    `% Diff`     = fmt_pct(pct),
    `SD A`       = fmt_num(sdA),
    `SD B`       = fmt_num(sdB),
    `Test size`  = ifelse(is.na(tstat), "", sprintf("%.2f", tstat)),
    `P Value`    = fmt_p(pval),
    Significant  = ifelse(!is.na(pval) & pval < 0.05, "Yes", "No"),
    check.names  = FALSE
  )
}

# ---- read measures from PBI ----

## Number of days x site
nA_days    <- getv("N DAYS X SITE (A)")
nB_days    <- getv("N DAYS X SITE (B)")
nA    <- getv("N (A)")
nB    <- getv("N (B)")

# ---- Sales Margin per day row ----

A_sm  <- getv("SM (A)")
B_sm  <- getv("SM (B)")
meanA_sm <- getv("SM MEAN (A)")
meanB_sm <- getv("SM MEAN (B)")
sdA_sm   <- getv("SM SD (A)")
sdB_sm   <- getv("SM SD (B)")

row1 <- welch_row(
  metric = "Sales margin per day x site",
  meanA = meanA_sm, sdA = sdA_sm, nA = nA_days,
  meanB = meanB_sm, sdB = sdB_sm, nB = nB_days,
  totalA = A_sm, totalB = B_sm,
  currency_means = TRUE
)

# ---- Total sale per day row ----

A_ts  <- getv("TS (A)")
B_ts  <- getv("TS (B)")
meanA_ts <- getv("TS MEAN (A)")
meanB_ts <- getv("TS MEAN (B)")
sdA_ts   <- getv("TS SD (A)")
sdB_ts   <- getv("TS SD (B)")

row2 <- welch_row(
  metric = "Total sale per day x site",
  meanA = meanA_ts, sdA = sdA_ts, nA = nA_days,
  meanB = meanB_ts, sdB = sdB_ts, nB = nB_days,
  totalA = A_ts, totalB = B_ts,
  currency_means = TRUE
)

# ---- Avg. gross amount row ----

meanA_AGA <- getv("AGA Mean (A)")
meanB_AGA <- getv("AGA Mean (B)")
sdA_AGA   <- getv("AGA SD (A)")
sdB_AGA   <- getv("AGA SD (B)")

row3 <- welch_row(
  metric = "Average gross amount",
  meanA = meanA_AGA, sdA = sdA_AGA, nA = nA,
  meanB = meanB_AGA, sdB = sdB_AGA, nB = nB,
  totalA = NA, totalB = NA,
  currency_means = TRUE
)


# ---- AVERAGE NUMBER OF UNITS per transaction ----

meanA_NU <- getv("NU Mean (A)")
meanB_NU <- getv("NU Mean (B)")
sdA_NU   <- getv("NU SD (A)")
sdB_NU   <- getv("NU SD (B)")

row4 <- welch_row(
  metric = "Average number of units per trans.",
  meanA = meanA_NU, sdA = sdA_NU, nA = nB,   # <- use your transaction-level Ns
  meanB = meanB_NU, sdB = sdB_NU, nB = nB,
  totalA = NA, totalB = NA,
  currency_means = FALSE     # not a currency metric
)

# ---- combine ----
tbl <- rbind(row1, row2, row3, row4)

# wrapping helper ---
wrap <- function(x, width = 14) {
  if (is.null(x)) return(x)
  vapply(as.character(x), function(s) paste(strwrap(s, width = width), collapse = "\n"), "")
}

# wrap header names
colnames(tbl) <- wrap(colnames(tbl), width = 10)

# wrap metric labels
tbl$Metric <- wrap(tbl$Metric, width = 18)

# Circle K theme colors
col_header_bg <- "#C8102E"   # accent red
col_header_fg <- "#FFFFFF"   # white text
col_body_bg   <- "#FFFFFF"   # white
col_body_fg   <- "#2D2D2D"   # dark grey text
col_grid      <- "#2D2D2D"   # outline

# Theme with Circle K look
theme_circlek <- ttheme_default(
  core = list(
    fg_params = list(cex = 0.85, fontfamily = "Segoe UI", col = col_body_fg),
    bg_params = list(fill = col_body_bg, col = col_grid, lwd = 0.5)
  ),
  colhead = list(
    fg_params = list(cex = 0.9, fontfamily = "Segoe UI Semibold", col = col_header_fg),
    bg_params = list(fill = col_header_bg, col = col_grid, lwd = 0.5)
  )
)

# Build grob
tbl <- tableGrob(tbl, rows = NULL, theme = theme_circlek)

# Stretch table to fill the visual
nr <- nrow(tbl$heights)
nc <- ncol(tbl$widths)
tbl$widths  <- unit(rep(1/ncol(tbl), ncol(tbl)), "npc")
tbl$heights <- unit(rep(1/nrow(tbl), nrow(tbl)), "npc")

# Draw
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(tbl)
'
'''Segoe UI Light'', wf_segoe-ui_light, helvetica, arial, sans-serif'
